title: Governed File Exclusions
description: Files in docs/ai/ and docs/governance/ that are intentionally not registered in document-registry.jsonl. Each entry must carry a documented reason. Adding entries without justification is a governance blind spot (RT-11).

entries.docs/governance/document-registry.jsonl: Registry itself — is the source of truth
entries.docs/governance/schemas/document-types.j: Schema — loaded by checkers, not itself a governed doc
entries.docs/governance/verification-debt-ledger: Operational ledger — tracked by verification-debt checker
entries.docs/governance/dependency-audit-debts.j: Debt ledger — tracked by debt checker
entries.docs/governance/owner-routing-rules.json: Operational routing — consumed by registry checker
entries.docs/governance/verification-gate-manife: Generated manifest — derived from checker registry
entries.docs/governance/red-team-remediation-pla: Remediation plan — proposal, not governed doc
entries.docs/ai/onboarding-snapshot.json: Generated snapshot — temporary AI context file
entries.docs/governance/schemas/governed-exclusi: Exclusion schema — meta-schema, loaded by atomic-governance checker
entries.docs/governance/schemas/protected-paths-: Protected-paths authority config — loaded by checker, not a governed doc
entries.docs/governance/schemas/agentic-patterns: Agentic-patterns authority config — loaded by checker, not a governed doc
entries.docs/architecture/aegisos-design-doctrin: Legacy AegisOS design doctrine — historical reference, excluded from governance
Legacy AegisOS layer roadmap — historical, excluded
entries.docs/architecture/aegisos-next-round-exe: Legacy AegisOS execution plan — historical, excluded
entries.docs/architecture/aegisos-post-mvp-refin: Legacy AegisOS post-MVP plan — historical, excluded
entries.docs/architecture/aegisos-working-identi: Legacy AegisOS working identity — historical, excluded
entries.docs/architecture/pfios-behavioral-basel: Legacy PFIOS behavioral baseline — historical, excluded
entries.docs/architecture/pfios-organizational-b: Legacy PFIOS organizational baseline — historical, excluded
entries.docs/product/aegisos-mvp-brief.md: Legacy Aegisos MVP brief — historical, excluded
entries.docs/product/aegisos-mvp-execution-check: Legacy Aegisos MVP checklist — historical, excluded
entries.docs/product/ai-financial-assistant-road: Legacy PFIOS financial assistant roadmap — historical, excluded
entries.docs/product/legacy-governance-stage-sum: LGC-S stage summit — already registered elsewhere, excluded from duplicate check
entries.docs/product/task-template-system.md: Legacy task template system — historical, excluded
entries.docs/design/README.md: Design system README — design docs are governed by design-pack, not document-registry
entries.docs/decisions/ADR-001-repo-structure.md: ADR — architecture decision records are self-documenting
entries.docs/governance/schemas/claim-vocabulary: Claim vocabulary schema — meta-schema defining forbidden words, loaded by overclaim detector
entries.docs/governance/schemas/path-map-rules.j: Path map classification rules — loaded by path-map scripts, not a governed doc
entries.docs/governance/schemas/path-map-node.sc: Path map node schema — meta-schema, not a governed doc
entries.docs/governance/schemas/path-map-edge.sc: Path map edge schema — meta-schema, not a governed doc
entries.docs/governance/generated/path-map.json: Generated path map — derived view, not a governed doc
entries.docs/governance/generated/_path-map.md: Generated path map markdown — derived view
entries.docs/governance/generated/path-map.dot: Generated path map dot — derived view
entries.docs/governance/evidence/: Evidence bundle directory — raw outputs and manifests, not governed docs
entries.docs/governance/schemas/authority-taxono: Authority taxonomy schema — meta-schema, not a governed doc
entries..env.example: Environment template — config, not governed doc
entries..gitleaks.toml: GitLeaks config — security tooling, not governed doc
entries.docs/governance/evidence/gos-pm-1/stage-: Evidence file — raw output or manifest
